heading: Oath of Senators
label: 21 Oath of Senators
text: The oath of office shall be administered by the President of the Senate to each Senator who shall be elected, previous to his taking his seat.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 28 derived from , .act June 1, 1789, ch. 1, § 21 Stat. 23
amendments: CodificationR.S. § 28 derived from , .act June 1, 1789, ch. 1, § 21 Stat. 23
